case_title: TIFFANIE GOLDE VS. VILMA GUINTO PEORO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-20-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PEORO, VILMA GUINTO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY GOLDE, TIFFANIE AS TO DEFENDANT PEORO, VILMA GUINTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-12-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-19-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-12-2012 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-19-2012 - JUDGMENT.
PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOLDE, TIFFANIE PETITION MAILED ON JUN 04, 2012
ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS SET FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGEMENT IS APPROVED. SIGNED BY: JUDGE DONALD S MITCHELL.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-19-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-19-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENT (SC-220) REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS (INSTALLMENT). FILED BY DEFENDANT PEORO, VILMA GUINTO
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOLDE, TIFFANIE AS TO DEFENDANT PEORO, VILMA GUINTO

ORDER (SC-222) ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENT BY INSTALLMENT FILED BY JUDGMENT DEBTOR IS "APPROVED", AND THE COURT ORDERS: PAYMENT OF $50.00 ON THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH, STARTING DATE: MAY-15-2012 UNTIL (DATE OF FINAL PAYMENT): AUG-15-2016. AMOUNT OF FINAL PAYMENT: $50.00. THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF PAYMENTS IS THE SAME AS THE JUDGMENT. IF ALL PAYMENTS ARE MADE IN FULL AND ON TIME, NO INTEREST WILL BE OWED ON THE JUDGMENT, AND THE JUDGMENT WILL BE PAID IN FULL. - PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOLDE, TIFFANIE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLDE, TIFFANIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEORO, VILMA GUINTO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,550.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

RETURNED MAIL: ENDORSED COPY OF APPROVED SIGNED ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT MAILED 6/8/12 TO THE DEBTOR VILMA GUINTO PEORO, "DOES NOT LIVE AT THAT ADDRESS/NO FORWARDING ADDRESS AVAILABLE".
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $73.92 AS TO DEFENDANT PEORO, VILMA GUINTO
